title: Email Template Automations
excerpt: I want to be able to change a status of another column when a certain email template is sent in Mass Emails. For example, when email #3 is sent, change status to send email #4 so that someone does not have to go in and m…

posts.author: dfrankel (Darian)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to change a status of another column when a certain email template is sent in Mass Emails. For example, when email #3 is sent, change status to send email #4 so that someone does not have to go in and manually update the status.
